user.title: Micro-Air EasyTouch Setup
user.description: Choose how to connect to your EasyTouch thermostat.

wifi.title: WiFi Connection
wifi.description: Enter the local IP address of your EasyTouch thermostat. Make sure it is on the same network as Home Assistant.

ble_pick.title: Select Thermostat
ble_pick.description: Select your EasyTouch thermostat from the list of nearby Bluetooth devices ({count} found).

ble_credentials.title: Bluetooth Credentials
ble_credentials.description: Optionally enter your Micro-Air account credentials for device {mac}. Leave both fields blank if your thermostat does not require a password.

zones.title: Zone Count
zones.description: How many independently controllable zones does your EasyTouch thermostat have? (max {max})

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to the thermostat. Check the address and try again.
error.no_devices_found: No EasyTouch thermostats found nearby. Make sure Bluetooth is enabled and the thermostat is powered on.
error.unknown: Unexpected error. Check the logs for details.
